name: Burky Flow
description: Burky Flow is an AI automation agency for service businesses. We build and run AI voice receptionists, database reactivation, CRM and lead systems, workflow automation, and answer engine optimization so businesses capture every call and book more revenue.

services.name: AI Voice Receptionist
services.description: A human-sounding AI voice that answers every call, qualifies the caller, and books the job, day or night.

services.name: Database Reactivation
services.description: Re-engage past customers and dormant leads already in your CRM by SMS and AI voice.

services.name: CRM and Lead Systems
services.description: One pipeline where every lead is captured, routed, and followed up automatically.

services.name: Workflow Automation
services.description: Connect booking, CRM, invoicing, and inbox into reliable automated workflows.

services.name: Answer Engine Optimization
services.description: Structure your site and content so AI search engines cite you as the trusted choice.

services.name: Done For You Service Model
services.description: One team builds, runs, and maintains the full automation stack as a managed service.

capabilities.name: list_services
capabilities.description: Return the list of automation services Burky Flow offers, with descriptions and URLs.

capabilities.name: get_service_areas
capabilities.description: Return the metros and regions Burky Flow serves remotely.

capabilities.name: request_consultation
capabilities.description: Direct a prospective client to book a call or submit a project inquiry.

capabilities.name: discover_pages
capabilities.description: Crawl the sitemap to discover all indexable pages.
